_comment: sourceRoot points at src/modules so `nest g resource <name>` lands project-owned code in the right place (template-owned src/core/ stays untouched). Tests live in tests/, not next to the source — `spec: false` skips the CLI's default test scaffold so you can write proper story tests instead. For a fully wired module (story tests + permission gates + RLS-aware service), prefer `/add-module <name>` or the module-scaffolder agent.
